key.name: refreshtime
key.description: Controls how often the extension refreshes resource readings in the top bar.

key.name: extensionposition
key.description: Chooses whether the indicator is added to the left, center or right area of the GNOME Shell panel.

key.name: displaymode
key.description: Chooses whether the indicator is shown only on the primary panel or on all Dash to Panel panels when Dash to Panel is available.

key.name: datascalebase
key.description: Chooses whether data unit scaling uses SI powers of 1000 or IEC powers of 1024.

key.name: leftclickstatus
key.description: Desktop file or command executed when the indicator is left-clicked.

key.name: customleftclickstatus
key.description: Stores the custom command shown in preferences for the left-click action.

key.name: rightclickstatus
key.description: When enabled, right-clicking the indicator opens the extension preferences window.

key.name: iconsstatus
key.description: Displays symbolic icons next to monitored resources in the panel.

key.name: iconsposition
key.description: Controls whether icons are shown to the left or right of their associated values.

key.name: secondaryseparatorstyle
key.description: Chooses how secondary metrics are separated in the panel: dot, slash, or brackets.

key.name: itemsposition
key.description: Stores the order of resources displayed by the extension.

key.name: cpustatus
key.description: Displays the main CPU usage indicator in the panel.

key.name: cpuwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the CPU usage label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: cpudecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for CPU usage.

key.name: cpurendermode
key.description: Chooses whether CPU usage is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: cpurenderstep
key.description: Step size used when CPU usage is shown in step render mode.

key.name: cpucolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to CPU usage values.

key.name: cpufrequencystatus
key.description: Displays the current CPU frequency in the panel.

key.name: cpufrequencywidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the CPU frequency label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: cpufrequencydecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for CPU frequency.

key.name: cpufrequencyrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether CPU frequency is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: cpufrequencyrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when CPU frequency is shown in step render mode.

key.name: cpufrequencycolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to CPU frequency values.

key.name: cpufrequencyunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for CPU frequency values.

key.name: cpuloadaveragestatus
key.description: Displays the system load average in the panel.

key.name: cpuloadaveragewidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the load average label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: cpuloadaveragedecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for load average.

key.name: cpuloadaveragerendermode
key.description: Chooses whether load average is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: cpuloadaveragerenderstep
key.description: Step size used when load average is shown in step render mode.

key.name: cpuloadaveragecolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to load average values.

key.name: ramstatus
key.description: Displays the RAM usage indicator in the panel.

key.name: ramwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the RAM label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: ramdecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for RAM values.

key.name: ramrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether RAM values are rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: ramrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when RAM values are shown in step render mode.

key.name: ramcolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to RAM values.

key.name: ramunit
key.description: Chooses whether RAM is shown as a numeric value or percentage.

key.name: ramunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for RAM values when numeric mode is enabled.

key.name: rammonitor
key.description: Chooses whether the extension displays used or free RAM.

key.name: ramalert
key.description: Shows a notification when available RAM drops below the configured threshold.

key.name: ramalertthreshold
key.description: Minimum available RAM percentage before a low-memory notification is shown.

key.name: swapstatus
key.description: Displays the swap usage indicator in the panel.

key.name: swapwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the swap label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: swapdecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for swap values.

key.name: swaprendermode
key.description: Chooses whether swap values are rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: swaprenderstep
key.description: Step size used when swap values are shown in step render mode.

key.name: swapcolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to swap values.

key.name: swapunit
key.description: Chooses whether swap is shown as a numeric value or percentage.

key.name: swapunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for swap values when numeric mode is enabled.

key.name: swapmonitor
key.description: Chooses whether the extension displays used or free swap.

key.name: swapalert
key.description: Shows a notification when available swap drops below the configured threshold.

key.name: swapalertthreshold
key.description: Minimum available swap percentage before a low-memory notification is shown.

key.name: diskshowdevicename
key.description: Displays the configured disk labels next to disk indicators in the panel.

key.name: diskstatsstatus
key.description: Displays disk throughput indicators in the panel.

key.name: diskstatswidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for disk throughput values. Zero keeps the labels adaptive.

key.name: diskstatsdecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for disk throughput values.

key.name: diskstatsrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether disk throughput values are rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: diskstatsrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when disk throughput values are shown in step render mode.

key.name: diskstatscolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to disk throughput values.

key.name: diskstatsmode
key.description: Chooses whether disk throughput is shown in single or multiple-value mode.

key.name: diskstatsunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for disk throughput values.

key.name: diskspacestatus
key.description: Displays disk space indicators in the panel.

key.name: diskspacewidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for disk space values. Zero keeps the labels adaptive.

key.name: diskspacedecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for disk space values.

key.name: diskspacerendermode
key.description: Chooses whether disk space values are rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: diskspacerenderstep
key.description: Step size used when disk space values are shown in step render mode.

key.name: diskspacecolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to disk space values.

key.name: diskspaceunit
key.description: Chooses whether disk space is shown as a numeric value or as a percentage.

key.name: diskspaceunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for disk space values when numeric mode is enabled.

key.name: diskspacemonitor
key.description: Chooses whether the extension displays used or free disk space.

key.name: diskdevicesdisplayall
key.summary: Show all disk devices in preferences
key.description: Includes unmounted block devices in the disk configuration list shown in preferences.

key.name: diskdeviceslist
key.description: Stores the disk devices enabled for throughput or space monitoring.

key.name: netautohidestatus
key.description: Hides Ethernet and Wi-Fi indicators when no active matching NetworkManager connection exists.

key.name: netunit
key.description: Displays network traffic in bytes or bits per second.

key.name: netunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred scale used for network throughput values.

key.name: netethstatus
key.description: Displays Ethernet download and upload throughput in the panel.

key.name: netethwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for Ethernet traffic values. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: netethdecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for Ethernet throughput.

key.name: netethrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether Ethernet throughput is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: netethrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when Ethernet throughput is shown in step render mode.

key.name: netethcolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to Ethernet throughput values.

key.name: netwlanstatus
key.description: Displays Wi-Fi download and upload throughput in the panel.

key.name: netwlanwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for Wi-Fi traffic values. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: netwlandecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for Wi-Fi throughput.

key.name: netwlanrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether Wi-Fi throughput is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: netwlanrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when Wi-Fi throughput is shown in step render mode.

key.name: netwlancolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to Wi-Fi throughput values.

key.name: thermaltemperatureunit
key.description: Displays thermal readings in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

key.name: thermalcputemperaturestatus
key.description: Displays averaged CPU thermal readings in the panel.

key.name: thermalcputemperaturewidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for the CPU temperature label. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: thermalcpudecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for CPU temperature.

key.name: thermalcpurendermode
key.description: Chooses whether CPU temperature is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: thermalcpurenderstep
key.description: Step size used when CPU temperature is shown in step render mode.

key.name: thermalcpucolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to CPU temperature values.

key.name: thermalcputemperaturedeviceslist
key.description: Stores the CPU thermal sensors detected and enabled in preferences.

key.name: thermalgputemperaturestatus
key.description: Displays GPU thermal readings for enabled devices in the panel.

key.name: thermalgputemperaturewidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for GPU temperature labels. Zero keeps the label adaptive.

key.name: thermalgpudecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for GPU temperature.

key.name: thermalgpurendermode
key.description: Chooses whether GPU temperature is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: thermalgpurenderstep
key.description: Step size used when GPU temperature is shown in step render mode.

key.name: thermalgpucolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to GPU temperature values.

key.name: thermalgputemperaturedeviceslist
key.description: Stores the GPU devices enabled for thermal monitoring.

key.name: gpustatus
key.description: Displays GPU usage and, when enabled, GPU memory values in the panel.

key.name: gpuwidth
key.description: Reserved width in pixels for GPU usage and memory values. Zero keeps the labels adaptive.

key.name: gpudecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for GPU usage.

key.name: gpurendermode
key.description: Chooses whether GPU usage is rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: gpurenderstep
key.description: Step size used when GPU usage is shown in step render mode.

key.name: gpucolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to GPU usage values.

key.name: gpumemorycolors
key.description: Stores threshold and color rules applied to GPU memory values.

key.name: gpumemorydecimals
key.description: Controls the number of decimal digits shown for GPU memory values.

key.name: gpumemoryrendermode
key.description: Chooses whether GPU memory values are rendered directly or quantized to a fixed step.

key.name: gpumemoryrenderstep
key.description: Step size used when GPU memory values are shown in step render mode.

key.name: gpumemoryunit
key.description: Chooses whether GPU memory is shown as a numeric value or percentage.

key.name: gpumemoryunitmeasure
key.description: Selects the preferred unit used for GPU memory values when numeric mode is enabled.

key.name: gpumemorymonitor
key.description: Chooses whether the extension displays used or free GPU memory.

key.name: gpudisplaydevicename
key.description: Uses the custom GPU display name configured in preferences instead of hiding the label.

key.name: gpudeviceslist
key.description: Stores the GPU devices enabled for usage and memory monitoring.
